title: Phishing Campaign Investigation in M365 Tenant
summary: Investigated a wide-scale phishing campaign targeting client M365 users. Used Defender XDR + Sentinel to identify compromised mailboxes, contain spread, and reset MFA across affected accounts.

title: Suspicious Sign-in Triage Walkthrough
summary: Walkthrough of a suspicious sign-in alert triage workflow using Entra ID logs, Risk Detections, and Conditional Access policies to confirm and remediate.
